---
description: Contributor workflow to investigate, implement, and submit a new provider source.
---

Guide me through adding a new waste-collection provider end-to-end.

Workflow to follow:
1. Confirm role (contributor vs maintainer) if unknown.
2. Gather provider basics (name, country, lookup URL, one public known-working example input).
3. Run the **source-investigator** workflow and present its structured recommendation.
4. If recommendation is feasible, run the **source-implementer** workflow using the full investigation report.
5. Help me verify clean PR diff (no generated files), create branch, commit, push, and open PR targeting `mampfes/hacs_waste_collection_schedule:master`.
6. Remind me not to run `update_docu_links.py` manually.

Use report sections so I can copy/paste outputs easily.
